executive_brief: This project is a greenfield RESTful API for a Learning Platform designed to manage student and instructor roles. The architecture leverages an asynchronous Python stack for high-performance data access and employs a strictly versioned API contract (/api/v1/) with a standardized JSON envelope. The system integrates external email delivery via Resend and enforces a rigid role-based access control (RBAC) model for course management and enrollment.

architectural_constraints: Mandatory asynchronous database execution (No synchronous access)
Prohibition of raw SQL; all access via ORM
JWT token lifecycle: 15-minute access expiry / 7-day refresh expiry
Database migrations exclusively handled via Alembic
Test environment requirement: Real PostgreSQL instance (No database mocking)

maturity_assessment: The architectural foundation is highly stable and logically coherent, making the project READY for immediate execution. The technical specifications provide clear directives on data persistence, authentication, and quality gates, ensuring a low-risk implementation phase. While a minor gap in future-scaling hypotheses exists, the core implementation rules are exhaustive and unambiguous.
critical_dependencies: Pre-merge validation: mandatory test coverage (80% target) and migration scripts
Explicit review gate for authentication or response envelope modifications
